item.title: F-009: Keyboard Support
item.intent: iPad with external keyboard must be a first-class writing experience — every action reachable without touching the screen
item.description: Text editing: Cmd+B/I/K, Cmd+Shift+K. Navigation: Cmd+Up/Down, Option+arrows, Cmd+arrows. App: Cmd+O/N/W, Cmd+Shift+P (source toggle). AI: Cmd+J. Cmd-hold shows shortcut overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: User with external keyboard performs all common editing, navigation, and AI tasks without touching the screen
All 15+ documented shortcuts (Cmd+B/I/K, Cmd+O/N/W, Cmd+J, Cmd+Shift+P, etc.) work in both rich and source view
No shortcuts conflict with iOS system shortcuts
Cmd-hold overlay lists ALL registered shortcuts organized by category
